text:
If a discounted compliment is familiar, this imposter syndrome pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Write down the actual evidence for your competence, say it out loud. And take the next step anyway. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. The discomfort of learning and the danger of being exposed are not the same feeling.
